prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科主榜2026年约第38名，近年排名稳定在36–39区间；2025年高考周期内声誉偏负面（6名学生在实习中因安全事故溺亡），可能对短期报考心理产生一定抑制；2026年周期内声誉中性/混合（秦皇岛校区命名争议）；抖音热度排名82、评价一般，短视频曝光量偏低；控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、冶金工程A、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-、软件工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏高，对相关专业报考有拉动作用；云南省2026年考生总数377900人，较2025年285688人增加约32%，物理类估算约22.9万人，竞争显著加剧；东北大学位于辽宁沈阳，在云南省招生占比约2.2%（2025年80人/全国3581人），本省（辽宁）招生占比约20.8%，属跨省招生比例较高的985高校，地域偏好对云南考生影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年招生计划持平、云南省考生大幅增加约32%导致竞争加剧，以及学校声誉中性偏弱等因素，在2025年基准7324名基础上预计位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约7474名，区间6974–7974名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest science rankings were approximately 7465 → 7815 → 7157 → 5523 → 7324. In 2024, an abnormally low ranking (5523) occurred, and in 2025 it rebounded significantly to 7324. The fluctuation range over the past 5 years is relatively large, with the 2025 baseline around 7324. The provincial science enrollment plan was 67 students in 2021–2022, 66 in 2023–2024, and increased to 68 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 68 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, it is approximately 38th, with rankings stable in the 36–39 range in recent years. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation was somewhat negative (6 students died in a safety accident during an internship), which may have a certain dampening effect on short-term application psychology. In the 2026 cycle, the reputation is neutral/mixed (controversy over the naming of the Qinhuangdao campus). Douyin popularity ranking is 82, with average reviews and relatively low short video exposure. It has 6 A- or above disciplines: Control Science and Engineering (A+), Computer Science and Technology (A), Metallurgical Engineering (A), Mechanical Engineering (A-), Materials Science and Engineering (A-), and Software Engineering (A-), highlighting strong engineering capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, driving applications for related majors. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Yunnan Province is 377,900, an increase of about 32% from 285,688 in 2025. The estimated number of physics category examinees is about 229,000, leading to significantly intensified competition. Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning, with a recruitment proportion in Yunnan Province of about 2.2% (80 students in 2025 out of 3,581 nationwide). Its local (Liaoning) recruitment proportion is about 20.8%, making it a 985 university with a relatively high cross-province recruitment ratio, and regional preference has limited impact on Yunnan examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 32% in Yunnan examinees leading to intensified competition, and the neutral-to-weak school reputation, the ranking is expected to shift slightly downward from the 2025 baseline of 7324. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7474, with a range of 6974–7974.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6974), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>7974), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 safe majors.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 1492 → 1741 → 1625 → 1628 → 2215. From 2021 to 2024, it was basically stable in the range of 1500–1750, but in 2025 it significantly shifted back to 2215. Over the past 3 years, the cumulative shift backward is about 590 places, with a baseline of about 2215 in 2025. The provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 8 students in 2021–2022, 9 in 2023–2024, and increased to 12 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 12 students, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 38th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, reputation was somewhat negative (internship safety incident), but in the 2026 cycle it is neutral/mixed. Douyin heat ranking is 82, with average reviews. Northeastern University is primarily engineering-oriented, with no A- or above disciplines directly corresponding to liberal arts. The Public Administration category (Law) can be associated with the Law discipline (not separately rated), and the Foreign Languages and Literature category can be associated with the Foreign Languages and Literature discipline (not separately rated).

专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Law major is divided and wait-and-see, while the Foreign Languages and Literature major has average popularity and is also wait-and-see. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the substantial increase of about 32% in History Category examinees in Yunnan Province, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026, with rankings continuing to shift backward.
